source_pr.title: dml : Support point get / batch point get for cache table
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: #29662 

Problem Summary:
This is a subtask of #25293 

### What is changed and how it works?
Suppor point_get / batch_get point  for cache table
+ forbid use MaxTs for cache table
+ for cache table the point get should try to read data from cache. 
+ for cache table the batch point get should try to read data from cache. 
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: race: failpoint-enable | result = tk.MustQuery("explain format = 'brief' select * from tmp1 where id>4 order by id") (table/tables/cache_test.go)
failure_signature: race: failpoint-enable | result = tk.MustQuery("explain format = 'brief' select * from tmp1 where id>4 order by id") (table/tables/cache_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: race: failpoint-enable | result = tk.MustQuery("explain format = 'brief' select * from tmp1 where id>4 order by id") (table/tables/cache_test.go).
fix_pattern: race: failpoint-enable | result = tk.MustQuery("explain format = 'brief' select * from tmp1 where id>4 order by id") (table/tables/cache_test.go)

evidence: evidence: race: failpoint-enable | result = tk.MustQuery("explain format = 'brief' select * from tmp1 where id>4 order by id") (table/tables/cache_test.go)
